ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, OR( ISPICKVAL( LegalNature__c ,"Corporation / Limited Company"), ISPICKVAL( LegalNature__c, "Limited Partnership"), ISPICKVAL( LegalNature__c, "Association / Foundation"), ISPICKVAL( LegalNature__c, "Public Administration / Other") ), OR( NOT(ISBLANK(LastName__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(FirstName__c)) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: For the following Legal Natures: Corporation/Limited Company, Limited Partnership, Association/Foundation and Public Administration. Please don't fill out First- & Last Name. (ACM018)
